overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The scene transitions from a towering megabuilding view down to street level, passing through intersections, a traditional Japanese torii gate, and covered walkways in a hazy, golden-hour lit cityscape.

moves from open plaza to enclosed street with buildings

red and white striped barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of a massive megabuilding silhouetted against a hazy golden sun. The camera tilts down to street level, revealing a futuristic urban sidewalk lined with palm trees and traffic barriers. The character follows a pedestrian walking ahead along the concrete path.

turning left onto sidewalk with traditional and modern architecture mix

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an intersection marked by a 'Kennedy Ave' sign, navigating around a yellow taxi. The scene transitions to a commercial sidewalk where a prominent red torii gate becomes visible in the distance, marking a blend of traditional and futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the imposing red torii gate, entering a street lined with teal-colored buildings featuring traditional Asian architectural elements. A large digital billboard for 'Chick N' Snack' dominates the right side as the street leads toward an overpass structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: entering shadow of covered overpass area
approaching bright exit from covered walkway

agents.ego_description: character walks through covered walkway passing multiple pedestrians and approaching the bright exit

notable_agents.action: woman with cybernetic arm walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the light

entered.detail: concrete underside of elevated highway casting deep shadows over the walkway
white metal barrier separating walkway from street
elevated curved road structure with chevron direction markings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting shifts to mixed artificial and natural light. The walkway is lined with metal safety fences and populated with pedestrians. The segment ends as the character approaches a bright exit, with towering futuristic buildings visible in the distance beyond the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a towering architectural vista into the dense, culturally blended streets of a futuristic city. It begins with a dramatic upward view of a massive megabuilding silhouetted against a hazy golden sun before tilting down to a sidewalk lined with palm trees and traffic barriers. As the character follows a pedestrian across the Kennedy Ave intersection and around a yellow taxi, the view opens up to reveal a prominent red torii gate in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character passes beneath the gate into a district of teal-colored buildings and glowing digital billboards, moving steadily toward a looming overpass. Finally, the camera enters a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway where natural light blends with artificial glows, following the path past metal fences toward a bright exit framed by distant skyscrapers.
